personal_note: Freezing rain. Questioned every life choice out there.
First ride in six weeks. Everything creaked.
Weather window. Took it before it closed.
Back-to-back. Probably stupid. Felt great though.
Legs trashed. Just a flat loop to spin out.
First big mountain day. Cramped on the final descent.
Quick gravel loop before the rain came back.
Century-plus. New record. Collapsed on the couch after.
Recovery spin along the river. Legs like wood.
Social ride. Stopped three times for photos.
Solo in the hills. No phone signal for four hours.
Dawn to dusk. Three mountain passes. Life-altering.
Recovery gravel. Could barely clip in.
River path out and back. Punctured at km 22.
Longest ride ever. Bonked twice. Cried once. Would do it again.
Too windy for anything ambitious. Kept it local.
Tempo ride. Tried zone 3 the whole way. Cracked at km 50.
Second day in a row. Found a rhythm somehow.
Three days straight. Addicted or stupid.
Fourth day. Body said no. Short flat spin anyway.
Back in the mountains. Two weeks rest paid off.
Solstice ride. Rolled until the light gave out at 10pm.
Loaded panniers test. Rack held up fine.
4:30am start. 38 degrees forecast. Home by noon.
Heatwave recovery. Shade-only route.
Evening spin. Still 33 degrees at 8pm.
The big one. Left at 4am. Ten hours in the saddle. Everything hurts.
Barely functional. Flat roads only.
Finally recovered from last week. Easy effort.
Full gravel loop. Rear tire sketchy on loose corners.
Intervals in the hills. 6x4min efforts. Felt strong.
Weekend double. This was the bigger one.
South climb plus north loop. Set three PRs.
Easy evening gravel. Wine at the turnaround point.
Autumn epic. Col was empty. Leaves turning. Transcendent.
maintenance_note: New brake pads front and rear

personal_note: Shakeout. Quads still twitching from yesterday.
Wet roads. Crashed at 15km/h on a painted line. Ego bruised.
Last long daylight ride of the year.
Fog so thick the climb felt like riding into nothing.
Leaf mulch on every gravel path. Sketchy descents.
Cold hands from km 5. Forgot gloves. Idiot.
Season finale. The longest and highest. Emptied the tank completely.
maintenance_note: Full service — cables housing and bottom bracket

personal_note: Dark at 4:30pm. Lights on for the last 40 minutes.
Freak warm day. Grabbed it.
Snow patches on the road. Careful on every corner.
Christmas morning. Empty streets. Perfect silence.
